subject: Re: Particles reextraction in MTools
body:
Hi Mingyu,
This isn’t implemented yet but is planned, here is an issue to track on GitHub 
https://github.com/warpem/warp/issues/149
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Sep 6, 2024, at 04:30, Mingyu Jung <jmg0910@snu.ac.kr> wrote:
﻿HI all,
Warp2 would be a gamechanger of my project. Thank you for developing this software!
But I couldn't find particle re-extraction function in MTools. Is there any way to re-extract subtomograms in MTools? I wanna try 4x binned -> 2x binned -> 1x binned extraction. 
Thank you!
Best,
Mingyu
